subject: fix: full audit sweep — 23 fixes across review, quality, docs, mobile, hygiene, perf, security, debug
body:
Critical:
- Remove unused KEYBOARD_DETECTION_THRESHOLD_PX import from BottomSheet
- Fix iOS Safari auto-zoom: LocationSearch input fontSize 15→16px
- Fix TESTING_GUIDE: snap positions 3→2, theme combos 4→5

High:
- Extract shared handlePanRelease/handlePanGrant helpers (dedupe pan logic)
- Fix map.once('load') race — cleanup prevents stale GeoJSON on rapid updates
- Fix handleStationClickRef redundant initializer in FuelMapWeb
- Add debugAdd for geocoding failures in LocationSearch

Medium:
- Remove web-only CSS from nativeStyles (cursor/touchAction unused on native)
- Replace hardcoded radius<50 with RADIUS_OPTIONS constant
- Remove incorrect getItemLayout — StationCard has variable height
- Add crossorigin to Mapbox CDN stylesheet (SRI preparation)
- Add noopener,noreferrer to window.open in navigation.ts
- Remove incorrect accessibilityRole="summary" from BottomSheetWeb
- Replace unused debug sources (navigation/render) with search/pwa
- Fix HISTORY theme combo descriptions to match actual implementation

Tags: audit, bugfix, security, accessibility, hygiene, debug, docs
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: mobile-web
Semver: patch
